explanation: The response correctly identifies the latency-bound bottleneck with HIGH confidence, cites specific metric values (98.9% long scoreboard stalls, 0.2% DRAM BW utilization, 99.3% occupancy, 0.03 FLOP/byte arithmetic intensity), and correctly attributes the root cause to dependent cache-hit latency rather than the misleading signal of high global load volume or DRAM bandwidth saturation.
